neqsim.process.dynamics.IntegratorStrategy

Description
neqsim.process.dynamics

  • Uses of IntegratorStrategy in neqsim.process.dynamics

    Classes in neqsim.process.dynamics that implement IntegratorStrategy
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    AdaptiveRK45Integrator
    Adaptive Runge–Kutta–Fehlberg (Cash–Karp) integrator producing a 5th-order solution with an embedded 4th-order error estimate.
    class 
    BDFIntegrator
    BDF-1 (backward differentiation formula of order 1, i.e. implicit Euler) integrator:
    class 
    ExplicitEulerIntegrator
    Explicit Euler integrator: x_{n+1} = x_n + dt · f(t_n, x_n).
    class 
    RK4Integrator
    Classical fourth-order Runge–Kutta integrator (RK4):

    Fields in neqsim.process.processmodel declared as IntegratorStrategy
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private IntegratorStrategy
    ProcessSystem.integratorStrategy
    Pluggable integration strategy advertised to equipment during runTransient.
    Methods in neqsim.process.processmodel that return IntegratorStrategy
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    IntegratorStrategy
    ProcessSystem.getIntegratorStrategy()
    Returns the pluggable IntegratorStrategy (defaults to ExplicitEulerIntegrator).
    Methods in neqsim.process.processmodel with parameters of type IntegratorStrategy
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    ProcessModel.setIntegratorStrategy(IntegratorStrategy strategy)
    Sets the same IntegratorStrategy on every child ProcessSystem.
    void
    ProcessSystem.setIntegratorStrategy(IntegratorStrategy strategy)
    Sets the pluggable IntegratorStrategy used by equipment that opt into the strategy API.
